title: Projektcontroller Infrastrukturprojekte (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in economics, engineering or comparable qualification
Experience in project controlling, project management, or project steering of complex infrastructure/energy projects
Knowledge in project management and scheduling
Analytical and structured work style, strong communication
High travel readiness (regular presence in Lüneburg and Stockelsdorf)
bonus_skills: Reporting for management and steering committees
matched_skills: Project controlling and reporting: HSBC burn-rate dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd project data monitoring and progress reports, ECE Group project data optimisation
Management reporting: HSBC — structured reports escalated to C-suite
Budget tracking: HSBC USD 8M programme financial governance
Risk identification and deviation analysis: HSBC risk escalation
Workshop preparation and facilitation: HSBC town halls, ECE Group meeting logistics
MS Office including Excel: confirmed in CV tools
missing_skills: MS Project (not listed in CV tools — JIRA used instead)
core_responsibilities: Analyse and control project progress; identify deviations and support countermeasure development
Create management reports, project analyses, and decision-making documents
Plan, structure, and track work packages and schedules in MS Project
Support change, quality, and reporting management
Prepare and moderate workshops and project meetings
Collaborate closely with project management, construction coordination, and other stakeholders
recommended_emphasis: HSBC PMO financial governance: USD 8M budget variance dashboards and weekly burn-rate reports — directly maps to project controlling responsibilities
Hapag-Lloyd project data monitoring and progress reports — directly demonstrates project controlling activities
ECE Group project reporting optimisation and spreadsheet automation
HSBC risk escalation and deviation management
Master's degree in Management as educational alignment
summary: Score 47.5 (weak match). Boru's project controlling experience (HSBC budget governance, Hapag-Lloyd progress reporting) aligns well with core responsibilities. The main gaps are German language (B1 vs required fluent), MS Project not listed, no infrastructure/energy domain experience, and travel requirements. If German is improving, this is a borderline candidate — the controlling and reporting skills are genuinely aligned.
